hooks.command: cd /c/Users/TP005/bliss-app && if git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet; then true; else git add -A && git commit -m "auto: sync" && git push; fi 2>/dev/null; cd /c/Users/TP005/bliss && if git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet; then true; else git add -A && git commit -m "auto: sync" && git push; fi 2>/dev/null; cd /c/Users/TP005/bliss-app && source .env && curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TG_TOKEN}/sendMessage" -d "chat_id=${TG_CHAT}" --data-urlencode "text=✅ 블리스 작업 완료" > /dev/null 2>&1

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); console.log(d.file_path||'')" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env 파일 수정 금지' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

cd /c/Users/TP005/bliss-app && source .env && MSG=$(echo "$NOTIFICATION" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); console.log(d.message||'알림')" 2>/dev/null || echo '알림'); curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TG_TOKEN}/sendMessage" -d "chat_id=${TG_CHAT}" --data-urlencode "text=🔔 블리스: $MSG" > /dev/null 2>&1
